name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐚𝐤𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐟𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐩𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐫𝐨𝐰... 𝐈'𝐦 𝐬𝐨 𝐟𝐮𝐜𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐨𝐮𝐬 𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐧𝐨𝐰."  |
where a casual relationship with Gojo leads to... a baby?



__________________



**TW: Might contain mentions of abortion. If you're not comfortable, please do not read. I don't want to upset anyone with this content.**



__________________



If there is one thing I can recommend to anyone in university, it is to take a PHILOSOPHY class!!!! It is actually so enlightening and relaxing, and if you love talking like me, the class discussions are so fun.

I do a medical science degree, majoring in pathology and neuroscience, and is by far so much more work and stress than philosophy, and yet I feel like I get so much more self-improvement with philosophy.

We had a reading on Immanuel Kant's Morality and like 😩 wooowww, life feels so much clearer. Like maybe my calling is to be a philosopher 🤭

ON OTHER NEWS--DID WE ALL SEE THE NEW JJK MANGA COVER OF MY BBY SATORU ALIVE??! I KNEW HE WAS COMING BACK THANK YOU LORD ❗️❗️❗️
